title: Quantum Photonic Computer Challenges: Quantum Decoherence, Quantum Error Correction (QEC), and Scalability
author_string: Ghasemi, Mehrdad, Kaatuzian, Hassan, Noshad, Houshyar, NoroozOliaei, Mahdi
journal: Frontiers in Optics + Laser Science 2024 (FiO, LS)
abstract: The error correction process in quantum photonic computers (QPCs) and their loss in photons are two important parameters of considering them as reliable devices for computing very large and complicated problems concerning classical computers. In this paper, the new promising algorithms have been discussed for employment in quantum photonic computers as robust and reliable computational tasks to define the best fidelity as a figure of merit in quantum error correction schemes. Furthermore, a parametric study has been done by adding noble metals to the Integrated Photonic Chip.
